quest.Name: Maps of Yesteryear
quest.Accomplishment: You found forgotten gardens deep within the rubber orchards.
quest.Hagiograph: Bleeding trees dry of their sap, =name= breathed life into a rubber effigy and deemed her Mudokah.
quest.Gospel: After felling a giant rubber tree, =name= cemented =player.possessive= friendship with hermits by raising an effigy of =player.reflexive=. Once the work done, they shed a drop of blood on it, and the newly awakened being called herself Mudokah.

step.Name: Travel to the Lost Garden
step.text: Journey to the center of the rubber orchard in search of a hidden lost garden.

step.Name: Unveil the History of the Lost Garden
step.text: Descend to the bottom of the lost garden and unveil the mystery behind its existence.

step.Name: Report Back to Mudokah
step.text: Return to Mudokah and inform her of the lost garden's history.
